title: juncus equisetinus
intro: Juncus equisetinus, also known as Equisetum-juncea or Horsetail, is a plant species that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its high concentration of silica, which is known to improve joint health and reduce inflammation. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including improving bone density, reducing the risk of osteoporosis, and supporting the immune system. Juncus equisetinus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to promote skin and wound healing.
